overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy, rain-soaked waterfront promenade in a cyberpunk city at night. The scene features palm trees, neon-lit shops, and reflective wet pavement, with the camera ascending stairs and walking along the water's edge before turning back toward the commercial area.

events.description: ascends from enclosed stairway to open waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: walking up a flight of concrete stairs toward the palm-lined waterfront

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase ascending to upper level
tall palm trees silhouetted against foggy sky at top of stairs
tall street lamp illuminating the fog
building with covered walkway and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the bottom of a concrete stairway at night. The camera ascends the stairs toward a foggy waterfront, with palm trees and a street lamp visible at the top. The surrounding buildings feature neon lighting typical of a cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with palm trees and neon signage

events.description: transitions from ascending stairs to level walking along waterfront
passes by a temporary food stall with white canopy on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-soaked waterfront promenade past palm trees and neon signs

notable_agents.action: person walking in the opposite direction along the promenade

entered.detail: metal railing separating walkway from the foggy water
large illuminated advertising screens on distant building facade
white canopy tent with warm lighting and people underneath
bright pink and blue neon signage on commercial building

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wet, reflective promenade with palm trees lining the left side and a metal railing on the right overlooking the foggy water. Digital billboards glow in the distance on the right, while neon signs illuminate the shops on the left. The camera passes a food stall with a white canopy and encounters a pedestrian walking the opposite way.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning along waterfront toward commercial area with dense neon signage

events.description: turns around 180 degrees to walk back toward the commercial area
approaches the neon-lit CYBER shop with bright pink signage

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back along the waterfront toward the brightly lit commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the promenade toward the camera

entered.detail: prominent neon sign reading CYBER with bright pink and blue lighting
high-rise building with illuminated windows visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: After turning around, the camera walks back along the waterfront promenade toward the commercial district. The CYBER shop with its bright neon signage becomes prominent on the left, while a tall residential tower looms in the foggy distance. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights from the surrounding buildings and street lamps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a concrete stairway into a neon-lit waterfront promenade before circling back toward a dense commercial district. It begins by climbing the stairs under the glow of cyberpunk architecture, emerging into a foggy atmosphere where palm trees and street lamps line the path. As the camera moves along the wet, reflective promenade, it passes a white-canopied food stall and a lone pedestrian, with digital billboards shimmering through the mist over the water's edge. The scene then shifts as the camera turns around, walking back toward the city center where the bright neon signage of a CYBER shop becomes prominent. Finally, the view expands to reveal a towering residential building looming in the distance, while the rain-soaked pavement mirrors the vibrant colors of the surrounding urban lights.
